subcodes.first_line: O Khusraw! Hearken unto the Divine Call from all directions. Praise be to God, the dark and gloomy winter hath passed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا خسرو ندای الهی را از جمیع جهات بشنو الحمد لله زمستان تیره ظلمانی گذشت و
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @living waters; water of life, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @spiritual springtime, @suffering and imprisonment
